base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of palette_chart_blocks_by_zone — a ui from 1985 super mario bros. Documentation block — each block state × each of 4 zone palettes (OW / UG / Castle / UW). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Documentation block — each block state × each of 4 zone palettes (OW / UG / Castle / UW); reference for runtime palette-swap at level-load
